meaning: vt.使从新正式就职,重新设置
examples: It will be best to wipe the system and reinstall everything.
You reinstall the same service without first restarting the computer.
If you use 6to4, you can reinstall end-to-end connectivity that you lost because of NAT.
Others say users must uninstall IE5 and reinstall it to purge the custom elements.
